error.signature: UserWarning: We strongly recommend passing in an `attention_mask` since your input_ids may be padded. See https://huggingface.co/docs/transformers/troubleshooting

verdict.summary: Model called without attention mask on padded inputs. Padding tokens will be attended to, producing wrong outputs.

dead_ends.why_fails: Suppressing the warning does not fix the bug. The model will attend to padding tokens and produce degraded outputs.

dead_ends.action: Pad inputs but skip attention mask assuming the model ignores padding
dead_ends.why_fails: Most transformer models attend to all tokens by default. Without attention mask, padding tokens corrupt the attention computation.

workarounds.action: Always pass attention_mask from tokenizer output
workarounds.how: inputs = tokenizer(text, padding=True, return_tensors='pt'); outputs = model(**inputs)  # attention_mask included automatically

workarounds.action: Use tokenizer with padding=True and return_attention_mask=True
Set pad_token if tokenizer does not have one
workarounds.how: tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token  # required for models like GPT-2 that lack a pad token
